title: Google strikes back! Gemini Omni, AI glasses, new models
summary: Google I/O announcement covering multiple new AI systems including Gemini Omni, Gemini 3.5 Flash, TPU hardware, AI-powered search agents, and XR glasses. The video discusses Google's response to competition with new multimodal models, updated search capabilities, and workspace integrations.
